chapter_title.ar: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ قَذْفِ مَنْ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْإِسْلَامِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – Abhorrence of slandering one who is not upon Al-Islam

text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَسَأَلَنِي رَجُلٌ مَا فَعَلَ غَرِيمُكَ قُلْتُ ذَاكَ ابْنُ الْفَاعِلَةِ فَنَظَرَ إِلَيَّ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) نَظَراً شَدِيداً قَالَ فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ إِنَّهُ مَجُوسِيٌّ أُمُّهُ أُخْتُهُ فَقَالَ أَ وَ لَيْسَ ذَلِكَ فِي دِينِهِمْ نِكَاحاً .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abu Al Hassan Al Haza’a who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so a man said to me, ‘What did your creditor do?’ I said, ‘That one is a son of a ‘sexually active (immoral) woman’ . So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> looked at me with a harsh look. So I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! He is a Magian. His mother is his sister’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Or is that not (considered a valid) marriage in their religion?’
